question:
Jompuses are bright. Every jompus is a rompus. Rompuses are not opaque. Rompuses are vumpuses. Each vumpus is red. Each vumpus is a numpus. Every zumpus is not fruity. Every numpus is not spicy. Numpuses are impuses. Each impus is temperate. Every impus is a wumpus. Every wumpus is fruity. Wumpuses are yumpuses. Yumpuses are liquid. Yumpuses are dumpuses. Dumpuses are small. Dumpuses are tumpuses. Polly is a rompus.

Is the following statement true or false? Polly is fruity.
